steps.title: Spot what the question asks
steps.content: The question requires a choice that “emphasizes” similarity. The key signal is language that directly highlights what the two works share, not what differs.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content:
The correct response emphasizes similarity by using “both” to identify acrylic as a shared medium.

The other choices each fail the requirement:
  • B simply lists dates.
  • C uses “while” to highlight that one work has paper collage and the other doesn’t.
  • D notes a size difference.

That confirms A is correct.
